bullets.text: The United Arab Emirates is set to withdraw from the OPEC oil cartel after nearly 60 years, a decision that could significantly impact the organization's future.
Fears of a resurgence in Somali piracy have emerged after three vessels were hijacked in a week, with pirates potentially exploiting the diversion of international naval resources to the Middle East.
Elon Musk has stated that some of his posts regarding Donald Trump "went too far" and expressed regret for them.
A five-year-old girl has gone missing from an Alice Springs town camp, with police alleging she has been abducted.
The United Arab Emirates has quit OPEC, a move that could weaken the oil cartel and has been seen as a win for the US president.
New inflation figures are expected to show the cost of living nearing 5 per cent, potentially hitting a three-year high.
The UAE plans to exit Opec, citing long-running frustrations over production quotas, a move that could significantly impact the oil cartel.
Hardliners in Iran are clashing over potential talks with the US regarding Tehran’s nuclear program, revealing divisions within the regime despite a projection of unity.
Emerging-market currencies and stocks experienced a downturn as a risk-off mood, partly driven by stalled peace talks in the Middle East, lifted the dollar.
